findings.summary: 005-006 child packet 001 still has a live P0 blocker (CF-108) because strict validation reproduces and the required fix depends on historical source-packet edits outside prior write authority.
findings.recommended_fix: Create a write-authorized follow-up for the historical source packets needed by CF-108, or formally defer the blocker with an ADR if those packets are intentionally immutable.

findings.summary: Phase 020 is documented as shipped in its implementation summary, but its tasks and parent status surfaces still read as unstarted/spec-ready.
findings.recommended_fix: Synchronize Phase 020 tasks/spec/parent map to the shipped summary and keep only the explicitly deferred items open.

findings.summary: Phase 026 still presents itself as a draft scaffold even though T01-T12 are checked and the implementation summary marks every scoped finding closed.
findings.recommended_fix: Refresh Phase 026 metadata and checklist/parent summary to match the landed remediation evidence, or rerun the remaining integration checks and close it fully.

findings.summary: The old 007/001 status-cleanup backlog is partially stale against current 009 packet truth: 009/003 now looks complete, but 009/001 is still falsely reported complete while its checklist is entirely pending.
findings.recommended_fix: Retire superseded 009/003 cleanup tasks, keep the 009/001 mismatch as active work, and rebuild the status-cleanup ledger from current packet state.

findings.summary: Current 009 hook/daemon parity drift has moved beyond what 007 tracks: 006 is still in progress and 010/011 were reverted and require reapply, but the old 007 backlog does not model those states.
findings.recommended_fix: Explicitly import the live 009 phase-map risks into the next 007 remediation scope instead of continuing to rely on the frozen 001 backlog packet.

findings.summary: determineSessionStatus() still auto-completes clean/high-activity sessions without requiring explicit completion evidence, matching the still-open T047 concern.
findings.recommended_fix: Require stronger explicit completion evidence before returning COMPLETED, and add regression tests for clean-worktree and high-activity false positives.

findings.summary: The /complete confirm workflow still advertises '@debug' escalation while dispatching the generic agent type in YAML, matching the still-open T049 concern.
findings.recommended_fix: Change debug_dispatch.subagent_type to debug and add parity coverage so the user-facing prompt and runtime dispatch stay aligned.

findings.summary: The 005-006 parent roll-up still reports a global draft/0-verified state even though some children are complete and one completed child still carries stale draft metadata.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce a parent roll-up status model for mixed child states and synchronize completed child specs/checklists before using the packet for future triage.
